text: Computer vision is a field of artificial intelligence that enables computers to understand and interpret visual information from the world. Two main tasks in computer vision are image recognition and object detection. Image recognition identifies what is in a picture, such as a cat or a tree. Object detection goes further by locating objects within an image, drawing boxes around them. These technologies have many practical applications. For example, in self-driving cars, computer vision helps the vehicle recognise traffic signs, pedestrians, and other cars. It also has uses in healthcare, where it can analyse medical scans, and in mobile phone cameras, which can automatically focus on faces.
